hooks.command: jq -r 'if ((.tool_input.file_path // "") | test("docs/(superpowers|specs)/")) then {hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Styre docs convention (CLAUDE.md): brainstorm specs -> docs/brainstorms/, plans -> docs/plans/, design docs -> docs/design/. Do NOT write under docs/superpowers/ or docs/specs/ (the superpowers skill default)."}} else empty end'
